'''Thrantin''', or '''OM813''', was the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] headquarters of [[Barosa Warren]] and the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]]. It was located in the [[Ollonir Boundaries]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]].<ref name="air" />

Around [[59 BBY/Legends|59 BBY]], or before that moment, [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]] Barosa Warren decided to retire and tried to create a survival academy. He obtained financial backing from some friends, enough to buy OM813 (renamed Thrantin). Then, during the four decades after it, Warren [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] all of Thrantin, aiming to create a training camp. While Warren admitted he should take students to different worlds to teach them, he also believed in having a "controlled environment" to ensure that none of his students could cheat. Warren thus created [[Zero-G]] areas, an [[Ammonia Ocean]] and the [[Heavy Grav Mountainous Zones]].<ref name="air" />

Since that moment, Thrantin became the planet-wide [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], directed by Warren himself with a specialized staff. Thrantin became a leading center producing very competitive scouts who have worked for any of the major parties in the galaxy.<ref name="air" />
